heading: Copy Documents to Clipboard
body:
**List-view:**List ViewTo copy a document to your clipboard, hover over the document
and click the copy **Copy** icon:![Copy Document from List View](/atlas-ui/images/atlas-ui/compass/copy-doc-list-view.png)**Json:**JSON ViewTo copy a document to your clipboard, hover over the document
and click the copy **Copy** icon:![Copy Document from JSON View](/atlas-ui/images/atlas-ui/compass/copy-doc-json-view.png)**Table-view:**Table ViewTo copy a document to your clipboard, hover over the document
and click the copy **Copy** icon:![Copy Document from Table View](/atlas-ui/images/atlas-ui/compass/copy-doc-table-view.png)
